description_long: This bungalow features a green gable roof with a prominent overhang and light-colored horizontal siding. The structure sits on a rectangular grassy plot with a small raised porch and steps leading to the main entrance. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of single and double-pane styles, and a larger window is visible on the side. The building appears to be elevated slightly above the ground, supported by a foundation or short stilts. The roof extends over both the main living area and a smaller side section, creating a visually distinct L-shaped footprint. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or rural residential neighborhoods.
description: A light-colored bungalow with a green gable roof, raised porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, steps, and main entrance under the green gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, two upper windows, and the elongated grassy base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a large window and the extended roof over the main living area.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back wall, elevated foundation, and porch steps.
